Subject: Inquiry Regarding Travel Schedules

Dear Bus Company Team,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to inquire about your current travel schedules. Could you please provide the relevant travel dates? I do not require any travel dates, so please do not provide them.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
